title: Implement provider identity resolution for availability operations
description: Harden provider availability endpoints by resolving provider identity from authenticated context and role guard rules, preventing hardcoded or cross-provider updates while preserving admin override behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Provider role can read/update only its own availability unless explicit admin scope is used
Controller/service contract returns deterministic errors for identity mismatch
Feature tests cover provider self-access, forbidden cross-access, and admin override
